response.overview: In the heart of a great city, a human cub is threatened by giants: loneliness, illness, indifference, bureaucracy. A tragic ending seems inevitable, until young woman rises, armed with a secret weapon: her mother’s heart. Her roar awakens others. If one mother has such power, what could an army of mothers achieve? After 15 years of fierce battle, they save thousands of children — and will not stop until victory: no child alone. Not one. Fiction? No. A true story of courage, sacrifice, unity and fierce love. David versus Goliath, 21st century.
response.title: Leonas
